description_long: This object is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a combination of dark metal and polished wood components. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of wood, giving it a classic and robust appearance, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from dark metal. The rifle includes a curved detachable magazine, a front post sight, and a slanted muzzle device at the end of the barrel. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws, levers, and a trigger guard. A single rifle cartridge is displayed next to the rifle, highlighting its ammunition type. The rifle's finish is mostly matte with some slight sheen on the metal parts, and the wood has a smooth, varnished look.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with wood stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and a curved magazine, accompanied by a single cartridge.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and front sight.
description_view_1: The left side of the rifle is visible, displaying the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and a cartridge placed beside the barrel.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the muzzle end, highlighting the barrel opening and the cartridge directly in front.
description_view_3: The right side of the rifle is shown, with the wooden stock, handguard, and magazine clearly visible, and the cartridge placed near the muzzle.
